title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
summary_full: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
summary_public: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
